notes: Shows only empty brownish screen on main menu with high Resolution (> 1920x1080). You can use "F" to disable fullscreen and resize the Window to a smaller Size. This then shows the main menu. Performance is also meager (between 20 and 30 fps)
title: Aurora Dusk: Steam Age
